---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new tool or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**New tool or improvement to existing tool?**

**Describe the feature** (plain English)
What should this do, in plain English?

**Why is this needed?** (which creature pipeline step does it address?)
What problem does it solve?

**Does this fit Fascia's scope?**
Fascia builds soft tissue — it does not generate meshes, rig skeletons, or contain AI. Does your request fit within that scope?

**Suggested approach** (optional)
Any ideas on how to implement it.

**Additional context**
Any other relevant information.
